errors.explanation: The term 4x^3 was incorrectly integrated. It appears to have been differentiated (4x^3 -> 12x^2) rather than integrated.

summary: The student made an error in integrating the first term, 4x^3, treating it as a differentiation or incorrectly applying the power rule, resulting in 12x^2 instead of x^4. However, the integration of the second term, -2x, was correct, yielding -x^2. The student also correctly included the constant of integration, +C. To improve, ensure to add 1 to the power and divide by the new power when integrating.
